subcodes.title: Words to Siyyid Asadu'llah Qumi, spoken on 1912-03-26
subcodes.first_line: If a man considers himself humble and lowly in the Cause of God, he becomes glorified in all eyes. On the other hand, the moment he aspires to personal greatness, he falls into disgrace and oblivion.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر انسان خود را در امر الله ذلیل و حقیر دانست نزد کل عزیز میشود بالعکس بمجرد خیال بزرگی ذلیل و ساقط میگردد
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @humility; meekness; lowliness
